div.p: Jump buffer array indexed by loop depth
c for i in 1 2; do // depth=1 for j in a b; do // depth=2 if [ $j = "a" ]; then break // target = 2-1 = 1 fi // longjmp(break[1]) done done

ul.li: setjmp is called at loop entry (saves context to buffer)
longjmp restores context from buffer, setjmp returns jump_code
Both parent and child loops have separate jump buffer slots
break N exits N loops by jumping to break_targets[depth - N]

g.text: Stack unwound to loop entry point
